common.scratchToReveal: Scratch or press Enter to reveal

requestDialog.empty: You already have access to every app available to you. If you think something is missing, contact an administrator.

noAccess.title: No Access
noAccess.messageUser: Hi {{user}}, you don't have permission to access any applications.
noAccess.messageAnon: You don't have permission to access any applications.
noAccess.hint: Please contact an administrator if you believe this is an error.
noAccess.requestSubmitted: Your access request has been submitted. An admin will review it shortly.
noAccess.alreadyPending: You already have a pending request for this. An admin will review it shortly.
noAccess.autoApproved: Access granted. The app should appear on your home page.

form.noRequestableRoles: You already hold every role available on this app.
form.justificationPlaceholder: Briefly explain what you'll use this access for.
form.justificationHint: This is shared with the admin who will approve or reject your request.

error.role_entitlement_conflict: Pick either a role or an entitlement, not both.
error.role_entitlement_app_mismatch: That role or entitlement does not belong to the chosen application.
error.principal_not_found: Your account isn't fully provisioned yet. Try again in a moment, or contact an administrator.
error.submit_failed: Couldn't submit the request. Please try again.
error.not_authenticated: You need to be signed in to request access.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

requests.title: My requests
requests.empty: You haven't requested access to any apps yet.

error.not_cancellable: This request is no longer pending and can't be cancelled.
error.cancel_failed: Could not cancel this request. Please try again.
error.principal_not_found: Your account isn't fully provisioned yet.
error.not_authenticated: You need to be signed in.
error.not_yours: That invitation isn't addressed to you.
error.not_pending: That invitation has already been resolved.
error.no_target: That invitation has nothing to grant.
error.invitation_failed: Couldn't complete that action. Please try again.
error.db: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.invitation_accepted: Invitation accepted — access is being provisioned.

settings.title: Settings - Duro
settings.heading: Settings
settings.languageHint: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

cert.heading: Certificates
cert.description: Manage your security certificates. Add a new certificate to set up a new device.
cert.confirm: A new certificate will be sent to {{email}}. Continue?
cert.success: Certificate sent to your email. Scratch below to reveal the install password.
cert.passwordWarning: Save this password — you'll need it to install the certificate from your email.

security.heading: Account & security
security.description: Your password, multi-factor authentication, sessions, and email are managed by your identity provider.
security.managedBy: Opens in a new tab. After making changes, you may need to sign back in here.

apiKeys.heading: API keys
apiKeys.empty: You haven't minted any API keys yet. Use one to let a CLI or script call duro on your behalf.

create.heading: Mint a new key
create.description: The key is only shown once. Pick least privilege; you can always mint a second key with broader scope later.

fields.name: Name
fields.namePlaceholder: e.g. Claude CLI on my Mac
fields.nameHint: Just for you — used in the list below to identify this key. 100 characters max.
fields.scopesHint: What this key is allowed to do. Stick to the minimum the calling tool needs.
fields.expiryHint: After this, the key stops working. You can always mint a fresh one.
fields.wildcardLabel: Grant full access (overrides the scopes above)
fields.wildcardWarning: Use only if you can't pick a tighter scope. A leak of this key gives the holder everything you can do.

reveal.title: {{name}} created
reveal.warning: Copy this key now. After you close this dialog it won't be shown again — only its preview.
reveal.fallbackLabel: Trouble copying? Select the text below manually.
reveal.ackSaved: I've saved this key in a safe place.

revokeConfirm.title: Revoke this API key?
revokeConfirm.body: {{name}} will stop working immediately. Calls using it will get HTTP 401.
revokeConfirm.warning: If you're using this key in a tool right now (e.g. Claude CLI), you'll need to update its config with a fresh key.

recover.title: Recover access
recover.subtitle: Lost the device with your certificate? Enter your account email and an admin will review your request.
recover.noteHint: Context to help the admin recognize your request.

sent.title: Request received
sent.message: If that account exists, an admin has been notified. Once approved, you'll get an email with a link to a new certificate.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.heading: Welcome, {{user}}!
welcome.message: Your account has been created and you're all set. You now have access to your personal dashboard.

logout.confirmBody: You'll be signed out of Duro and any apps that share this single sign-on session.
logout.confirmHint: You can always sign back in from the home page.

glossary.principals: A principal is anything that can be granted access — a user, a group, or a service account. Users represent people; groups bundle users by role; service accounts represent automated systems.
glossary.grants: A grant binds a principal to a role (or entitlement) on a specific application. It's the actual record that says "alice can write to nas". Grants can expire and be revoked.
glossary.applications: An application is anything Duro governs access to — a web app, a mounted share, a managed service. Each application has its own roles, entitlements, and resources.
glossary.entitlements: An entitlement is a fine-grained permission like "read" or "admin", scoped to one application. Roles bundle entitlements; grants bind principals to either a role or a single entitlement.
glossary.authzPlayground: A read-only tool for testing access decisions. Pick a principal, an application, and an action; the engine returns ALLOW or DENY plus the matched grants and the reasoning. Running a check changes nothing.
glossary.audit: An append-only log of every governance event — grants created or revoked, principals changed, access requests decided. Filter by actor, target, or event type to investigate "who did what".
glossary.accessRequests: User-initiated requests for access to an application. Each request is evaluated by an admin (or a policy) and turns into a grant when approved.
glossary.appsCatalog: Every application Duro governs. Badges show your status per app: Granted (you have a role), Partial access (you have a role but more are available), Pending (request awaiting approval), Open (no permission needed), Invite only (admin must invite you), Request access (you can ask for a role).
glossary.myRequests: Your access requests across all applications. Pending ones can be cancelled here; approved/rejected/cancelled rows are kept as a record.
glossary.invitations: An access invitation pre-creates the grants a person should receive when they accept. Distinct from the system-level User Invites flow which provisions an account in the identity provider.
glossary.groupMappings: A group mapping links an OIDC group claim to either a Duro principal group or an application role, so people who belong to that group in your identity provider automatically get the mapped access when they log in.
glossary.plugins: A plugin extends an application with custom behaviour (provisioning, sync, notifications). This page shows a plugin's manifest, where it's installed, and its recent activity.
glossary.bootstrap: On a fresh deployment, the very first admin is created from a single-use bootstrap token your operator placed in Vault. This wizard reads that token server-side and queues an invite for the email you enter. After the invite is consumed, this page locks itself.
glossary.identities: People and machine identities — human users with their mTLS certificates, plus groups, service accounts, and devices — and the access each one holds.

expired.title: Invite Expired
expired.message: This invite has expired. You can request a fresh one below.

used.title: Already Joined
used.message: This invite has already been used. If you need help, contact the person who invited you.

error.title: Unable to Join
error.invalid: This invite link is invalid or could not be found.
error.missingToken: This invite link is missing required information.
error.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please contact an administrator.
error.unknown: Something went wrong loading this invite. Please try again, or contact your administrator if the problem persists.

password.title: Certificate Password
password.warning: Scratch to reveal your certificate password. Save it — you'll need it to install the certificate you download above.
password.consumed: The certificate password has already been revealed. If you need a new invite, use the link in your original invitation email.
password.oneTime: Save this password — you'll need it to install the certificate.

cert.notInstalled: It looks like your certificate isn't installed yet. Download the .p12 file above and install it, then click the button below.
cert.hint: After installing the certificate, you may need to close and reopen your browser for it to be recognized.

certRequired.title: Certificate Required
certRequired.message: Your certificate isn't installed yet. Go back to install it first, then return here.

validation.usernameFormat: Username must be 3-32 characters (letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores)
validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 12 characters

success.title: Successfully Joined
success.message: Welcome to {{appName}}! Your account is ready — head to your dashboard to get started.

reinvite.title: Request New Invite
reinvite.heading: Request New Invite
reinvite.message: Your previous invite for {{email}} has expired or the certificate password was already revealed. You can request a fresh invite below.

success.title: New Invite Sent
success.message: A new invitation email has been sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox for the new link and certificate.

error.title: Cannot Re-invite
error.missingToken: This re-invite link is missing required information.
error.invalid: This re-invite link is invalid or could not be found.
error.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used to create an account. If you need help, contact the person who invited you.
error.stillValid: Your invite is still valid. Check your email for the original invitation link.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again, or contact your administrator if the problem persists.
error.sendFailed: Failed to send a new invite. Please try again.

groupMappings.title: Group Mappings ({{count}})
groupMappings.empty: No group mappings yet. Add one to map an OIDC group claim to a Duro group or an application role.
groupMappings.oidcGroupDesc: The group name as it appears in OIDC claims
groupMappings.confirmDeleteBody: Members of this OIDC group will stop receiving the mapped access on their next login. This cannot be undone.

pluginDetail.notInstalled: Not installed on any application yet.

recovery.heading: Device Recovery
recovery.description: Pending requests from users who lost all their devices. Approving issues a new certificate, emailed to the account.
recovery.approved: Recovery approved — a new certificate was emailed
recovery.confirmApproveBody: This issues a new certificate and emails it to {{email}}. Tick the box below only if you also want to revoke their existing devices.
recovery.confirmDenyBody: The request is dismissed and no certificate is issued. The user would need to submit a new request.

setup.heading: Set up your deployment
setup.subtitle: Create the first admin account for {{appName}}. This page is only available until the first admin exists.

success.title: Invite ready
success.body: An invite for {{email}} has been queued and emailed. You can also continue right here:

resent.title: Certificate re-sent
resent.body: A user for {{email}} already exists, so a fresh mTLS client certificate has been emailed to them. The existing admin account was kept as-is.

error.no_token: No bootstrap token was found in Vault. Make sure your operator placed one at secret/data/duro/bootstrap-token before opening this page.
error.vault_unreachable: Could not reach Vault. Check VAULT_ADDR and the deployment's Kubernetes service account configuration.
error.vault_invalid_response: The bootstrap secret in Vault has an invalid structure. Expected fields: token, expires_at.
error.token_mismatch: The supplied token does not match the one stored in Vault.
error.token_expired: The bootstrap token has expired. Generate a fresh one and retry.
error.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
error.email_in_use: A user with that email already exists in the directory. Pick a different one or remove the existing user first.
error.admin_group_missing: The admin group is not yet provisioned in the directory. Create it before bootstrapping.
error.bootstrap_in_progress: Another bootstrap submit is already in progress. Try again in a moment.
error.queue_failed: The invite was rejected during queueing — likely an SMTP or PKI failure. Check server logs and retry.

checklist.title: Get started
checklist.subtitle: A few next steps to make this deployment useful:

empty.principals: No principals yet. Sync your identity provider or invite users to get started.
empty.applications: No applications yet. Click "Sync from cluster" or define one in your governance config.
empty.grants: No active grants. Open an application to assign a role to a principal.
empty.audit: No audit events match the current filters.
empty.users: No users yet. Invite someone from the User Invites page.

authz.title: Authorization Playground
authz.subtitle: Run the authorization engine against a principal/application/action and see what it would decide right now.
authz.readOnlyNotice: Read-only — running a check here does not change any grants, permissions, or state.
authz.actionHint: The entitlement slug being requested. Common values: access, read, write, admin.

grants.title: Active Grants ({{count}})
grants.confirmRevokeBody: This removes the granted access immediately. The principal loses this role until it is granted again.

new.title: Create grant
new.noRoles: This application has no roles yet. Add one before granting access.
new.ldapNote: This application is provisioned via LDAP. Group grants for provisioned apps arrive in phase 2 — only user principals are offered here.
new.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this grant being created?
new.expiresHint: Local date. The grant expires at midnight UTC on the chosen day.

accessRequests.title: Access Requests ({{count}})
accessRequests.decisionHint: Approve grants the requested role. Reject denies it permanently. Cancel marks the request as no longer relevant — for example, the requester left or the request is obsolete.

invites.emailHint: Press Enter or comma to add each email

actions.confirmRevokeUserBody: Revoking {{user}} disables their account and revokes their certificates. They lose access immediately and must be re-invited to return.

certs.revokeAllConfirm: Revoke all certificates for this user?
certs.confirmRevokeUsersBody: All active certificates for {{count}} user(s) will be revoked. The users will lose access until a new certificate is issued.
certs.confirmRevokeCertsBody: {{count}} certificate(s) will be revoked. Devices using these certificates will lose access immediately.
certs.confirmRevokeWarning: This action cannot be undone. New certificates must be issued to restore access.

error.target_required: Choose a role or an entitlement to grant.
error.target_exclusive: Choose either a role or an entitlement, not both.
error.principal_not_found: Your admin account could not be resolved.
error.not_pending: That invitation has already been resolved.

dialog.title: Create Access Invitation
dialog.expiresHint: Defaults to {{days}} days if left empty.

error.title: Oops!
error.404msg: The requested page could not be found.

invite.subject: You've been invited to {{appName}}
invite.heading: Welcome to {{appName}}

step1.title: Step 1: Install Your Certificate
step1.body: Click the button below to open your invite page, where you can download your certificate and reveal the password to install it.
step1.macos: macOS: Double-click the .p12 file to open Keychain Access, enter the password when prompted, then trust the certificate.
step1.windows: Windows: Double-click the .p12 file, follow the Certificate Import Wizard, and enter the password when prompted.

step2.title: Step 2: Create Your Account
step2.body: After installing your certificate, click the button below to create your account.

invite.footer: This link expires in 7 days. Need a new invite? Request one here. If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

renewal.subject: Your new {{appName}} certificate
renewal.heading: New Certificate
renewal.body: A new security certificate for {{appName}} has been issued.

reveal.body: Reveal its one-time password and download the certificate.p12 file on the secure page below. The link is valid for 24 hours.

install.title: Install Your New Certificate
install.body: Please install this certificate to continue accessing {{appName}} services. You may need to remove the old certificate first.
install.macos: macOS: Double-click the .p12 file to open Keychain Access, enter the password when prompted, then trust the certificate. You can remove the old certificate from Keychain Access.
install.windows: Windows: Double-click the .p12 file, follow the Certificate Import Wizard, and enter the password when prompted. You can remove the old certificate from the Certificate Manager.

renewal.footer: Your account and access remain unchanged — only the certificate has been updated. If you didn't expect this, please contact your administrator.

certReveal.title: Your certificate
certReveal.subtitle: Scratch below to reveal the one-time password for the certificate issued to {{email}}, then download it. You'll need both to install certificate.p12.

revealed.title: Password already revealed
revealed.note: The one-time password for {{email}} has already been shown. You can still download the certificate below while this link is valid.

error.title: Cannot reveal password
error.invalid: This reveal link is invalid or could not be found.
error.expired: This reveal link has expired. Request a new certificate to get a fresh link.
error.consumed: This password has already been revealed. Request a new certificate if you still need one.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again or request a new certificate.
